A1 = 3*x120^4*beta - 12*x120^3*x220*beta + 18*x120^2*x220^2*beta - 12*x120*x220^3*beta + 3*x220^4*beta


B1 = + 21*x110*x120^3*beta - 63*x110*x120^2*x220*beta + 63*x110*x120*x220^2*beta - 21*x110*x220^3*beta - 3*x120^6 + 18*x120^5*x220 - 45*x120^4*x220^2 - 21*x120^3*x210*beta + 60*x120^3*x220^3 + 63*x120^2*x210*x220*beta - 45*x120^2*x220^4 - 63*x120*x210*x220^2*beta + 18*x120*x220^5 + 21*x210*x220^3*beta - 3*x220^6 

C1 = + 57*x110^2*x120^2*beta - 114*x110^2*x120*x220*beta + 57*x110^2*x220^2*beta - 30*x110*x120^5 + 150*x110*x120^4*x220 - 300*x110*x120^3*x220^2 - 114*x110*x120^2*x210*beta + 300*x110*x120^2*x220^3 + 228*x110*x120*x210*x220*beta - 150*x110*x120*x220^4 - 114*x110*x210*x220^2*beta + 30*x110*x220^5 + 30*x120^5*x210 - 150*x120^4*x210*x220 + 300*x120^3*x210*x220^2 + 57*x120^2*x210^2*beta - 300*x120^2*x210*x220^3 - 114*x120*x210^2*x220*beta + 150*x120*x210*x220^4 + 57*x210^2*x220^2*beta - 30*x210*x220^5 

D1 = + 72*x110^3*x120*beta - 72*x110^3*x220*beta - 129*x110^2*x120^4 + 516*x110^2*x120^3*x220 - 774*x110^2*x120^2*x220^2 - 216*x110^2*x120*x210*beta + 516*x110^2*x120*x220^3 + 216*x110^2*x210*x220*beta - 129*x110^2*x220^4 + 258*x110*x120^4*x210 - 1032*x110*x120^3*x210*x220 + 1548*x110*x120^2*x210*x220^2 + 216*x110*x120*x210^2*beta - 1032*x110*x120*x210*x220^3 - 216*x110*x210^2*x220*beta + 258*x110*x210*x220^4 - 129*x120^4*x210^2 + 516*x120^3*x210^2*x220 - 774*x120^2*x210^2*x220^2 - 72*x120*x210^3*beta + 516*x120*x210^2*x220^3 + 72*x210^3*x220*beta - 129*x210^2*x220^4 

E1 = + 36*x110^4*beta - 306*x110^3*x120^3 + 918*x110^3*x120^2*x220 - 918*x110^3*x120*x220^2 - 144*x110^3*x210*beta + 306*x110^3*x220^3 + 918*x110^2*x120^3*x210 - 2754*x110^2*x120^2*x210*x220 + 2754*x110^2*x120*x210*x220^2 + 216*x110^2*x210^2*beta - 918*x110^2*x210*x220^3 - 918*x110*x120^3*x210^2 + 2754*x110*x120^2*x210^2*x220 - 2754*x110*x120*x210^2*x220^2 - 144*x110*x210^3*beta + 918*x110*x210^2*x220^3 + 306*x120^3*x210^3 - 918*x120^2*x210^3*x220 + 918*x120*x210^3*x220^2 + 36*x210^4*beta - 306*x210^3*x220^3 

F1 = - 423*x110^4*x120^2 + 846*x110^4*x120*x220 - 423*x110^4*x220^2 + 1692*x110^3*x120^2*x210 - 3384*x110^3*x120*x210*x220 + 1692*x110^3*x210*x220^2 - 2538*x110^2*x120^2*x210^2 + 5076*x110^2*x120*x210^2*x220 - 2538*x110^2*x210^2*x220^2 + 1692*x110*x120^2*x210^3 - 3384*x110*x120*x210^3*x220 + 1692*x110*x210^3*x220^2 - 423*x120^2*x210^4 + 846*x120*x210^4*x220 - 423*x210^4*x220^2

G1 = - 324*x110^5*x120 + 324*x110^5*x220 + 1620*x110^4*x120*x210 - 1620*x110^4*x210*x220 - 3240*x110^3*x120*x210^2 + 3240*x110^3*x210^2*x220 + 3240*x110^2*x120*x210^3 - 3240*x110^2*x210^3*x220 - 1620*x110*x120*x210^4 + 1620*x110*x210^4*x220 + 324*x120*x210^5 - 324*x210^5*x220

H1 = - 108*x110^6 + 648*x110^5*x210 - 1620*x110^4*x210^2 + 2160*x110^3*x210^3 - 1620*x110^2*x210^4 + 648*x110*x210^5 - 108*x210^6
